raw: THIS IS A COUPON PASS Library pass admits up to 6 guests to Davis Farmland or Davis Mega Maze at the gate with a savings of $10 off per ticket Children under 2 are free of charge. NOTICE: Adults must be accompanied by at least one child 12 years or younger when visiting Davis Farmland or Davis Mega Maze https://davisfarmland.com/tickets/

source_phrases.audience_policies[1].form: Children under 2 are free of charge
